prompt_text:
### Demographics: 74-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 19 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Frailty with Mobility Impairment
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Rheumatoid Arthritis
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (paternal grandfather)
- Social history: Current smoker (15 cigarettes/day for 10 years; ~7.5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Glimepiride 2mg once daily; Insulin Degludec 20units once daily; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 79.2 kg; Height 157.1 cm; BMI 32.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 125/78 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.6%; 9 months ago 10.5%; 6 months ago 11.0%; 3 months ago 10.5%; current 10.1%), FPG (12 months ago 272mg/dL; 9 months ago 297mg/dL; 6 months ago 320mg/dL; 3 months ago 229mg/dL; current 251mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 79.9kg; 9 months ago 76.8kg; 6 months ago 77.3kg; 3 months ago 76.1kg; current 79.2kg), Height (12 months ago 157.1cm; 9 months ago 157.1cm; 6 months ago 157.1cm; 3 months ago 157.1cm; current 157.1cm), BMI (12 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 31.0kg/m²; current 32.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 126mmHg; 9 months ago 126mmHg; 6 months ago 125mmHg; 3 months ago 126mmHg; current 125mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 74mmHg; 9 months ago 78mmHg; 6 months ago 75mmHg; 3 months ago 77mmHg; current 78mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 25U/L; 9 months ago 30U/L; 6 months ago 29U/L; 3 months ago 32U/L; current 27U/L), AST (12 months ago 26U/L; 9 months ago 24U/L; 6 months ago 22U/L; 3 months ago 29U/L; current 27U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 29mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 25mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 23mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 22mL/min/1.73m²; current 21mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 206mg/g; 9 months ago 156mg/g; 6 months ago 175mg/g; 3 months ago 253mg/g; current 217mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 71mg/dL; 9 months ago 71mg/dL; 6 months ago 75mg/dL; 3 months ago 71mg/dL; current 73mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 44mg/dL; 9 months ago 47mg/dL; 6 months ago 46mg/dL; 3 months ago 43mg/dL; current 45mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 108mg/dL; 9 months ago 129mg/dL; 6 months ago 108mg/dL; 3 months ago 124mg/dL; current 117mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 11.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
